title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successfully building with Claude Code, inspired by Y Combinator's CEO. He outlines six moves for leading an AI team and provides a four-question test to evaluate projects before starting, drawing from his experience scaling AI-focused startups and agencies.
